productDisplayName: Nike Women Solid Grey Track Pants
description: CompositionGrey tracks made of 88% recycled polyester and 12% spandex Dri-Fit fabric, has a wide blue ribbed waistband with a printed swoosh logoFitSlimWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Line dryDo not ironDo not dry clean Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike training pants come in a slim fit design with a slight flare below the knees.
